name: habeebs-skill
description: Research-grounded engineering methodology — a composable skill chain that grounds implementation in real production patterns rather than generic best-practices.

plugins.name: habeebs-skill
plugins.description: prior-art-research → draft-spec → socratic-grill → decision-record → write-plan → tdd-loop → verify-output → release, with parallel-dev, deep-modules, vertical-slice, using-worktrees, systematic-debugging, agent-factors-check, devex-review, security-audit, and setup-habeebs-skill as supporting primitives.
